procedure.name: Atomic Red Team validation for T1039
procedure.description: Automated emulation procedure for T1039 executed via Invoke-AtomicRedTeam inside the Metatron lab environment.

sigma.title: Suspicious Access to Sensitive File Extensions
Copy From Or To Admin Share Or Sysvol Folder

osquery.name: t1039_file_access
osquery.query_text: SELECT target_path, action, uid, time FROM file_events WHERE action IN ('OPEN', 'READ') AND target_path NOT LIKE '/proc/%' ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 100;

sigma_matches.title: Suspicious Access to Sensitive File Extensions
Copy From Or To Admin Share Or Sysvol Folder

story.narrative: Execution, telemetry, detections, artifacts, network observations, and SOAR response are tracked as separate witnesses and tied together through shared anchors.

promotion.reason: Full S5 validation (Linux Docker sandbox): 3 direct run(s), 2/2 Sigma rules matched with event linkage, 0 osquery correlations confirmed, raw telemetry preserved, analyst reviewed, clean baseline.

integrity.hash_method: SHA-256 of canonical JSON (sort_keys=True, default=str) excluding the integrity block itself
